overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Buffer ETF - December (QDEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holdings period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. QDEC was launched on Dec 18, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
